creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #10)

Nice! Now port have the possibility of depending on upstream default editor gvim from editors/vim or flavored editors/neovim-qt which is nice because it shares same deps as qutebrowser on selected flavor.

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=759dd1d9268bede36ef83561616c6f9d46d48549

Cheers
